{"sql":"SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sentry_issues WHERE status = 'unresolved') AS unresolved_sentry,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM linear_issues WHERE state NOT IN ('done', 'canceled')) AS linear_open,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM github_pull_requests WHERE state = 'open' AND title ILIKE '%SSO SCIM provisioning%') AS github_prs_open,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sentry_issues WHERE status = 'unresolved') …(+212)
